title: SCP-662, Butler's Hand Bell
description: A small handbell that summons a polite butler who assists the player.
body:
The Butler's Hand Bell adds a new creature. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-662 also known as the Butler's Hand Bell.


SCP-662 appears as a simple silver handbell can be found lying on the ground. When rung, it summons a mysterious butler named Mr. Deeds. The bell can be carried or placed back on the ground, allowing players to call upon Mr. Deeds for assistance, tasks, or protection.  Mr. Deeds for example can bring players food, repair damaged items, set torches or fight monsters, making SCP-662 one of the safest anomalies to interact with.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Can I change my title which Mr. Deeds calls me?

You can change your title Mr. Deeds calls you (male or female) if you use the command /changepronouncs. 

► Where does SCP-662 spawn?

SCP-662 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-662.

</details>



![SCP-662](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/571b659c8a40a4a1a2b44f0ffbf70df38c95052f.png)

SCP-662 appears as a small silver handbell that can be picked up from the ground. When picked up, SCP-662 can be placed back on the ground or can be rung. When the player rings it, Mr. Deeds will appear nearby, but only if no other butler is currently active. Mr. Deeds is a calm, polite servant who attacks hostile mobs and follows the player. He will also send text messages whenever he talks and is interacted with. When right clicked, a menu will open where you can select a variety of tasks: Healing the player when they are below 15 health, bringing a variety of food when their hunger drops below 15 points, repairing the item held in the main hand, lighting dark areas below light level 9, extinguishing the player if they are burning, playing music, or answering the question “Who are you?”. The player can also command him to disappear at any time.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
